---
title: "Association for Promoting the General Welfare of the Blind"
---

## Association for Promoting the General Welfare of the Blind

**Type:** organization

### About

This charity was founded by Elizabeth Gilbert (1826–1885) in 1854.  Its archives are held by the London Metropolitan Archives. Mentioned 3 June 1863.

### Letters Mentioning This Organization


---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
